word: H3527 - כָּבַר - kâbar - kaw-bar' - In abundance

sections.paragraph:
Original: כּבר

Transliteration: kâbar

Phonetic: kaw-bar'

BDB Definition:

  1. to be much, be many, be in abundance, intertwine, multiply
    1. (Hiphil) to make many, make great

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 947

Part(s) of speech: Verb
